title: The Story of X-Circle
original_title: เอ็กซ์แมน แฟนพันธุ์เอ็กซ์
overview: Club X, one of Thailand's most famous urban legends, a hidden community where people from all walks of life gather to discuss their most bizarre sexual experiences. They start to attract attention when a member stalks a famous actress and photographs her naked. The police send Ja to investigate.

trailers.title: THE STORY OF X- CIRCLE TRAILER WITH SUB.VOB
